sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111080" key="filogare/laios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλο-γᾰρέλαιος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n111080.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fond of fish-pickle and oil,</tr_> pr. n. of a parasite in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
